---
title: "Semester_Project"
format: html
---


## Load Required Library

```{python}
import pandas as pd
```

## Read the CSV File

```{python}
df = pd.read_csv("data/lightcast_job_postings.csv", low_memory=False)
df.head()
```

## Check Dataset Shape

```{python}
print("Rows and Columns:", df.shape)
```

## View Column Names

```{python}
print(df.columns.tolist())
```

## Basic Summary Statistics

```{python}
df.describe()
```
